title: sauropus quadrangularis var. puberulus
intro: Sauropus quadrangularis var. puberulus, also known as the var. puberulus of the pirajá plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sauropus quadrangularis var. puberulus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
